description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a moderately pitched gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small overhang and large windows, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted siding, and the windows are framed in a contrasting tone. On one side, there is a visible garage door, while the opposite side displays additional windows for side rooms. The property is set on a rectangular concrete pad, and the rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation. Three large display panels are positioned along one side, possibly for signage or decorative purposes.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, large front windows, and a side garage, set on a concrete pad with display panels along one edge.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large windows, and the overhanging roof, with display panels visible to the right.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the depth of the roof, the garage door, and the arrangement of display panels along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a simpler facade with fewer windows and the garage door on the right.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the roof's full length and additional windows, with display panels in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front windows and grouped side windows
